name: home-health-care-operations
description: Home-health / home-care agency operations — 2 agents (home-health-agency-lead, home-care-operations-specialist) covering intake & eligibility / benefit verification, the physician-order & certification gate, OASIS & the plan of care, PDGM period billing & RCM (Medicare / Medicaid waiver / private pay), caregiver scheduling with continuity, EVV capture & exceptions (21st Century Cures Act), conditions-of-participation & survey readiness, and quality (HHCAHPS, Star ratings, value-based purchasing) — across skilled home health and private-duty / non-medical home care. 3 skills, a 2-doc knowledge bank, and 2 templates. Distinct from hospice-referral-sales, senior-care-operations (facility-based senior living), and medical-revenue-cycle (hospital/physician RCM) — home health owns care delivered IN THE HOME and the agency that delivers it. Not medical/legal/reimbursement advice; volatile CMS/PDGM/OASIS/EVV/Medicaid specifics carry a retrieval date + verify-at-use. Needs ravenclaude-core.
